summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stock-Pulse Brain Phase 1 & Phase 2 implementation. All 9 tasks verified: P0 (Tasks 1-4) critical architecture, P1 (Tasks 5-7) ML enhancements, P2 (Tasks 8-9) cleanup. 39/39 tests passed (100%). Fixed TFT model import error when PyTorch unavailable.

minor.issue: TFT model failed to import when PyTorch not installed due to torch.Tensor type hints
minor.fix_applied: Changed torch.Tensor type hints to Any in _quantile_loss method, added stub nn.Module for graceful degradation

critical_code_review_comments: Task 1 VERIFIED: SignalFusionWeights has exact values (technical=0.35, sentiment=0.20, fundamental=0.20, volume=0.15, macro=0.10), ml_model property removed
Task 2 VERIFIED: SignalEvent has expected_hold_days (default=5) and swing_phase (default='accumulation'), calculation logic in signal_fusion.py works correctly
Task 3 VERIFIED: Normalizer and KafkaBridge initialized in engine.py _start_ingestion_pipeline(), logs show 'Ingestion Pipeline: ✅'
Task 4 VERIFIED: FeatureStore has store_features() and get_features() methods, engine.py uses abstraction instead of direct MongoDB
Task 5 VERIFIED: TFT model has VariableSelectionNetwork, LSTMEncoderDecoder, InterpretableMultiHeadAttention, quantile regression (P10/P50/P90)
Task 6 VERIFIED: EnsembleManager has regime-aware blending (XGBoost=40%, LightGBM=30%, GARCH=30%) with bull/bear/sideways adjustments
Task 7 VERIFIED: XGBoost and LightGBM have export_onnx() methods with onnx_exportable=True in get_info()
Task 8 VERIFIED: LLMSettings no longer has tier3_provider and tier3_model (only tier1 and tier2 remain)
Task 9 VERIFIED: MetaLabeler class in meta_labeling.py with train/predict/save/load methods
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 Phase 1 & Phase 2 tasks verified. Signal generation API returns expected_hold_days and swing_phase fields. TFT model gracefully degrades when PyTorch unavailable. EnsembleManager regime-aware blending tested. ONNX export methods exist but require onnxmltools dependency for actual export.
rca_of_the_issue: TFT model import failure: The VariableSelectionNetwork, LSTMEncoderDecoder, and InterpretableMultiHeadAttention classes were defined outside the TORCH_AVAILABLE check, causing NameError when PyTorch not installed. Additionally, torch.Tensor type hints in TFTModel._quantile_loss caused AttributeError. Fixed by adding stub nn.Module class and changing type hints to Any.
